data.title: Footwear Firm Caleres Struggles in Q3, Cuts Annual Forecast Amid Sales, Margin Pressures
data.description: Caleres, Inc. (NYSE: CAL) reports Q3 results below expectations, with revenues of $740.9M and adjusted EPS of $1.23. Famous Footwear sales down 4.8% and company lowers FY24 guidance.

data.title: Build-A-Bear Boasts Strong Earnings: 'Most Profitable Q3 In Our History,' CFO Says
data.description: Build-A-Bear Workshop shares are trading higher after the company reported a third-quarter 2024 revenue growth of 11% year-over-year.

data.title: FDA Approves AstraZeneca's Blockbuster Cancer Drug Imfinzi For Aggressive Form Of Lung Cancer
data.description: AstraZeneca's Imfinzi gains FDA approval for LS-SCLC after ADRIATIC trial shows survival benefits. Separate trials explore additional cancer therapies.

data.title: Joaquin CastrilloSalgado Takes Money Off The Table, Sells $1.75M In Evertec Stock
Insider Transaction: Juniper Investment Company LLC Sells $686K Worth Of Lincoln Educational Servs Shares
